examples.title: Equivalence Checker
examples.description: Verifies RST properties for a given relation
examples.code:
FUNCTION isEquivalence(relation, set):
  FOR ALL a IN set:
    IF (a,a) NOT IN relation: RETURN False
  FOR ALL (a,b) IN relation:
    IF (b,a) NOT IN relation: RETURN False
  FOR ALL (a,b), (b,c) IN relation:
    IF (a,c) NOT IN relation: RETURN False
  RETURN True
examples.explanation: Checks reflexivity, symmetry, and transitivity sequentially
